name: USS Greenlet (ASR 10)
events: 01 CDR. Laing, Frederick Williams, USN (30) 29 May 1943 - 2 January 1944 02 LT. Hodgson Jr., James Thompson 2 January 1944 - 20 June 1945 03 LT. Willhoite, Robert Buford 20 June 1945 - 15 February 1947 04 LCDR. Horsman, Donald Glenn 15 February 1947 - 5 September 1948 05 LCDR. Birney, George Russell 5 September 1948 - 10 September 1949 06 LCDR. Fulton, Howard Thomas 10 September 1949 - 21 September 1950 07 LCDR. Des Granges, Miano 21 September 1950 - 5 January 1952 08 LCDR. Griggs III, John Bradford, USN (43) 5 January 1952 - 10 July 1953 09 LT. Ullrich, Howard Clifton 10 July 1953 - 25 August 1955 10 LCDR. Hoover, Clarence Paul 25 August 1955 - 25 January 1958 11 LCDR. Coulbourne, Thomas Edward 25 January 1958 - 30 January 1960 12 LCDR. Hill, Howard Allen 30 January 1960 - 6 July 1963 13 LCDR. Leibold, William Rudolf 6 July 1963 - 14 July 1965 14 LCDR. Clark, Lynn Reginald 14 July 1965 - 29 July 1967 15 CDR. Carry, Allan Harry 29 July 1967 - 9 August 1969 16 LCDR. Delanoy, Billie L. 9 August 1969 - 25 April 1970 17 LT. Trinka, Anton John 25 April 1970 - 12 June 1970 (2)
31 Oct 1943 USS Searaven (T/Lt.Cdr. M.H. Dry, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Greenlet (T/Cdr. F.W. Laing, USN). (3)
10 Jan 1944 USS Sunfish (T/Cdr. E.E. Shelby, USN) and USS Tang (T/Lt.Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Greenlet (Lt. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR).

11 Jan 1944 During 11/12 January 1944, USS Searaven (T/Lt.Cdr. M.H. Dry, USN) and USS Apogon (T/Cdr. W.P. Schoeni, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Greenlet (Lt. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). (4)
17 Jan 1944 USS Nautilus (T/Cdr. W.D. Irvin, USN) and USS Tang (T/Lt.Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Greenlet (Lt. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR).

18 Jan 1944 During 18/19 January 1944, USS Nautilus (T/Cdr. W.D. Irvin, USN) and USS Tang (T/Lt.Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Greenlet (Lt. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). These included night exercises.
13 Mar 1944 During 13/14 April 1944, USS Tang (T/Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). These included night exercises. (5)
9 Apr 1944 USS Burrfish (T/Cdr. W.B. Perkins, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). (6)
10 Apr 1944 USS Burrfish (T/Cdr. W.B. Perkins, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR), USS PC-579 (Lt. R.L. Biggs, USNR) and USS Girasol (?). (6)

11 Apr 1944 USS Tautog (T/Cdr. T.S. Baskett, USN) and USS Burrfish (T/Cdr. W.B. Perkins, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR), USS PC-579 (Lt. R.L. Biggs, USNR) and USS Girasol (?). (7)

12 Apr 1944 USS Tautog (T/Cdr. T.S. Baskett, USN) and USS Burrfish (T/Cdr. W.B. Perkins, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR), USS PC-579 (Lt. R.L. Biggs, USNR) and USS YMS 286 (Lt.(jg) D.L. Middleton, USNR). (7)
18 Jun 1944 From 18 to 20 June 1944, USS Skate (T/Cdr. W.P. Gruner, Jr., USN) conducted training exercises off Midway together with USS Litchfield (T/Lt.Cdr. A.F. Hollingsworth, USN).
During 19 and 20 June USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR) also participated in the exercises. (8)

27 Jul 1944 USS Tang (T/Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) and USS Batfish (T/Cdr. J.K. Fyfe, USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Litchfield (T/Lt.Cdr. A.F. Hollingsworth, USN) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). (9)

28 Jul 1944 USS Tang (T/Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) and USS Batfish (T/Cdr. J.K. Fyfe, USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Litchfield (T/Lt.Cdr. A.F. Hollingsworth, USN), USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR) and USS PC-483 (Lt. R.W. Anderson, USNR). (9)
29 Jul 1944 USS Tang (T/Cdr. R.H. O'Kane, USN) and USS Batfish (T/Cdr. J.K. Fyfe, USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). (9)

11 Nov 1944 During 11/12 November 1944, USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. R.M. Keithly, USN) and USS Razorback (T/Lt.Cdr. C.D. Brown, USN) conducted exercises off Midway with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR).

27 Nov 1944 During 27/28 November 1944, USS Seadragon (Cdr. J.H. Ashley, Jr., USN), conducted exercises off Midway together with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USN). These included night exercises.

19 Feb 1945 During 19 and 20 February 1945, USS Kete (T/Lt.Cdr. E. Ackerman, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Doherty (Lt. W.J. O'Brien, USNR), USS Baron (Lt.Cdr. W.M. Dickerson, USNR) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). These included night exercises. (10)

21 Feb 1945 USS Sawfish (T/Lt.Cdr. D.H. Pugh, USN) and USS Kete (T/Lt.Cdr. E. Ackerman, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Doherty (Lt. W.J. O'Brien, USNR), USS Baron (Lt.Cdr. W.M. Dickerson, USNR) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). (10)

23 Feb 1945 During 23 and 24 February 1945, USS Kete (T/Lt.Cdr. E. Ackerman, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). These included night exercises. (10)
25 Feb 1945 USS Kete (T/Lt.Cdr. E. Ackerman, USN) and USS Sea Fox (T/Cdr. R.C. Klinker, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR). (10)

17 Mar 1945 USS Blackfish (T/Cdr. R.F. Sellars, USN), USS Burrfish (T/Lt.Cdr. M.H. Lytle, USN) and USS Bang (T/Lt.Cdr. O.W. Bagby, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Doherty (Lt.Cdr. W.J. O'Brien, USNR), USS Baron (Lt.Cdr. W.M. Dickerson, USNR) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR).
18 Mar 1945 USS Burrfish (T/Lt.Cdr. M.H. Lytle, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Baron (Lt.Cdr. W.M. Dickerson, USNR) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USNR).
20 Mar 1945 USS Seahorse (T/Cdr. H.H. Greer, Jr., USN, with Vice-Admiral C.W. Lockwood, USN on board) conducted exercise off Guam with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USN). (11)

20 Apr 1945 USS Bowfin (Cdr. A.K. Tyree, USN) conducted exercises off Guam together with USS Baron (Lt.Cdr. W.M. Dickerson, USNR), USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USN) and USS Raby (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Slade, USNR).

12 May 1945 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. W.J. Germershausen, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Griswold (Lt.Cdr. L. Cresap, Jr., USNR), USS Steele (T/Cdr. M.E. Dennett, USN) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USN).
13 May 1945 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. W.J. Germershausen, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USN).

30 Jun 1945 USS Dragonet (T/Lt.Cdr. G.G. Hinman, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (T/Lt. R.B. Willhoite, USN), USS Seid (Lt. A.F. Craft, USNR) and USS PC-620 (Lt.(jg). M.E. Wiemers, USNR).

1 Jul 1945 USS Dragonet (T/Lt.Cdr. G.G. Hinman, USN) and USS Scabbardfish (T/Cdr. F.A. Gunn, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (T/Lt. R.B. Willhoite, USN), USS Crouter (Lt. C.F. Braught, USNR), USS Seid (Lt. A.F. Craft, USNR) and USS PC-620 (Lt.(jg). M.E. Wiemers, USNR).
On completion of the day exercises USS Scabbardfish returned to Guam escorted by USS PC-620.
The other ships remained at sea for night exercises and returned to Guam on 2 July.

5 Jul 1945 USS Dragonet (T/Lt.Cdr. G.G. Hinman, USN) and USS Spikefish (T/Lt.Cdr. R.R. Managhan, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (T/Lt. R.B. Willhoite, USN), USS Crouter (Lt. C.F. Braught, USNR), USS Seid (Lt. A.F. Craft, USNR) and USS YMS-357 (Lt. J.P. Potsch, USNR).
On completion of the day exercises USS Spikefish returned to Guam escorted by USS YMS-357.
The other ships remained at sea for night exercises and returned to Guam on 6 July.

29 Jul 1945 USS Pargo (T/Cdr. D.B. Bell, USN), USS Devilfish (T/Lt.Cdr. S.S. Mann, Jr., USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) and USS Tigrone (T/Lt.Cdr. V.E. Schumacher, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (T/Lt. R.B. Willhoite, USN). (12)
30 Jul 1945 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Greenlet (T/Lt. R.B. Willhoite, USN).

10 Aug 1945 During 10/11 August 1945, USS Hackleback (T/Cdr. F.E. Janney, USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Seid (Lt. A.F. Craft, USNR) and USS Greenlet (T/Lt. R.B. Willhoite, USN). These included night exercises.
